mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.supplier_name, u.real_name as create_user_name FROM purchase_order o LEFT JOIN supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.create_user = u.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order(order_no, supplier_id, total_amount, order_status, create_user) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{createUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order SET order_status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, p.product_name FROM purchase_order_item i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order_item(order_id, product_id, quantity, price, amount) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM purchase_order WHERE order_status = 1 AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())

SELECT s.supplier_name as name, SUM(o.total_amount) as value FROM purchase_order o JOIN supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE o.order_status = 1 GROUP BY o.supplier_id, s.supplier_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
